summary: Good audience recording of a high‑energy 1979 show with standout China Cat > I Know You Rider and an excellent Eyes‑Sailor‑Saint sequence, though the first set feels uneven.
review: The recording captures a lively late‑'79 performance that shines on the second half – the Eyes‑Sailor‑Saint stretch and the China Cat into I Know You Rider are repeatedly praised. The audience tape is generally clear and often cited as one of the best‑sounding crowd recordings, but some listeners note a less polished first set and occasional lyrical flubs.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly (several 5‑star comments) and describe the audience recording as good to excellent, yielding a strong combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Several reviewers call it one of the best‑sounding audience tapes, though a few note it isn’t top‑notch and has minor imperfections.

standout_songs: China Cat > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is described as uneven and sometimes sounding like a soundcheck, while the second set delivers high energy and memorable transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Flubs lyrics on China Cat early in the show but later delivers a possessed performance on I Know You Rider.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised as being 'on another planet' during this run, indicating exceptional playing.
